letter_of_intent: I taught myself statistics from library books because my school had no AP track.
After my family business closed, I learned to code at night to support us.
I started a peer tutoring group that grew to thirty students in one year.
Research was not offered at my college, so I emailed labs until one said yes.
Balancing two jobs and full-time classes taught me to manage anything.
A community college mentor saw something in me before I saw it in myself.
I rebuilt our robotics club from nothing after the pandemic shut it down.
English is my third language; writing this essay is itself a milestone.
I want to study the brain because caring for my grandmother changed me.
My internship showed me the gap between theory and practice I want to close.
